idea-plugin.name: OpenAI MCP
idea-plugin.description:
OpenAI models via Ace Data Cloud — chat completions, embeddings, image generation and editing, Responses API, and async tasks, all over MCP.

Once configured, AI Assistant can run OpenAI chat completions, generate embeddings, create or edit images, and orchestrate the Responses API — all routed through Ace Data Cloud.

Features

  • 11 AI Tools — Chat completion, Embeddings, Image generation, Image editing, Responses API and more
  • Easy Setup — One-click copy MCP configuration for AI Assistant
  • Dual Mode — STDIO (local) and HTTP (remote) server support
  • Token Management — Store API token securely in IDE settings

Available Tools

  • Chat completion — Run chat with GPT-4, GPT-5, and more
  • Embeddings — Generate text embeddings
  • Image generation — Create images with gpt-image and DALL·E
  • Image editing — Edit existing images with text prompts
  • Responses API — Stateful agentic responses
  • Async tasks — Submit and poll long-running jobs

Quick Start

  1. Install this plugin
  2. Open Settings → Tools → OpenAI MCP
  3. Enter your Ace Data Cloud API token
  4. Click Copy Config and paste into Settings → Tools → AI Assistant → MCP

Requires uv (Python package runner) for STDIO mode, or use HTTP mode for zero-install remote access.

action.description: Copy STDIO MCP configuration for AI Assistant
Copy HTTP MCP configuration for AI Assistant

idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.1.0

  • Initial release
  • MCP server integration with JetBrains AI Assistant
  • STDIO and HTTP transport modes
  • Settings UI for API token management
  • One-click MCP config copy
